title: When Hostility was shown to Him
fullText:
يَامَنْ لاَ يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ أَنْبَآءُ الْمُتَظَلِّمِينَ

O He from whom is not concealed news of the aggrieved!

وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يَحْتَاجُ فِي قِصَصِهِمْ إلَى شَهَادَاتِ الشَّاهِدِينَ

O He who has no need to be told about them by the witnessing of the witnesses!

وَيَا مَنْ قَرُبَتْ نُصْرَتُهُ مِنَ الْمَظْلُومِينَ

O He who whose help is near to the wronged!

وَيَا مَنْ بَعُدَ عَوْنُهُ عَنِ الظَّالِمِينَ قَدْ عَلِمْتَ

O He whose aid is far from the wrongdoers! Thou knowest,

يَا إلهِي مَا نالَنِي مِنْ [فُلاَنِ بْنِ فُلاَن] مِمَّا حَظَرْتَ

my God, how so-and-so, son of so-and-so, has harmed me in that which Thou hast forbidden,

وَانْتَهَكَهُ مِنّي مِمَّا حَجَزْتَ عَلَيْهِ بَطَراً فِي نِعْمَتِكَ عِنْدَهُ وَاغْتِرَاراً بِنَكِيرِكَ عَلَيْهِ

and how he has violated me in that which Thou hast prohibited, showing thereby ingratitude toward Thy favour upon him and delusion concerning what Thou hast denied him.

أللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ اللَّهُمَّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ

O God, so bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَخُذْ ظَالِمِي وَعَدُوِّي عَنْ ظُلْمِي بِقُوَّتِكَ

keep my wrongdoing enemy from wronging me through Thy strength,

وَافْلُلْ حَدَّهُ عَنِّي بِقُدْرَتِكَ وَاجْعَلْ لَهُ

blunt his blade toward me through Thy power, and assign to him

شُغْلاً فِيَما يَلِيهِ وَعَجْزاً عَمَّا يُناوِيْهِ

a diversion in that which is close to him and the inability to reach his enemy!

أللَّهُمَّ وَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ

O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَلاَ تُسَوِّغْ لَهُ ظُلْمِي وَأَحْسِنْ عَلَيْـهِ عَوْنِي،

let the wrongdoer not find it easy to wrong me, give me good help against him,

وَاعْصِمْنِي مِنْ مِثْـلِ أَفْعَالِهِ، وَلا تَجْعَلْنِي فِي مِثْلِ حَالِهِ.

preserve me from the like of his acts, and place me not in the like of his situation!

أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ ،

O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَأَعِدْنِي عَلَيْهِ عَدْوى حَاضِرَةً تَكُونُ مِنْ غَيْظِي بِهِ شِفَاءً،

and assist me with an immediate assistance that will heal my rage toward him

وَمِنْ حَنَقِي عَلَيْهِ وَفَاءً.

and redeem my fury toward him!

أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ

O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَعَوِّضْنِي مِنْ ظُلْمِهِ لِي عَفْوَكَ،

compensate me for his wronging me with Thy pardon

وَأَبْدِلْنِي بِسُوْءِ صنِيعِهِ بِيْ رَحْمَتَكَ،

and replace his evil action toward me with Thy mercy,

فَكُلُّ مَكْرُوه جَلَلٌ دُونَ سَخَطِكَ،

for every detested thing less than Thy anger is slight

وَكُلُّ مُرْزِئَةٍ سَوَاءٌ مَعَ مَوْجِدَتِكَ.

and every disaster next to Thy rancour indifferent!

أللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا كَـرَّهْتَ إلَيَّ أَنْ أَظْلِمَ فَقِنِي مِنْ أَنْ أُظْلَمَ.

O God, just as Thou hast made me detest being wronged, so also protect me from doing wrong!

أللَّهُمَّ لاَ أَشْكُو إلَى أَحَد سِوَاكَ،

O God, I complain to no one but Thee,

وَلاَ أَسْتَعِينُ بِحَاكِم غَيْرِكَ حَاشَاكَ

and I seek help from no ruler other than Thee - how could I?

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ،

So bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَصِلْ دُعَائِي بِالإِجَابَةِ، وَأَقْرِنْ شِكَايَتِي بِالتَّغْيِيرِ.

join my supplication to response, and unite my complaint with change!

أَللَّهُمَّ لا تَفْتِنِّي بِالْقُنُوطِ مِنْ إنْصَافِكَ،

O God, tempt me not with despair of Thy just treatment

وَلاَ تَفْتِنْـهُ بِالأَمْنِ مِنْ إنْكَارِكَ،

and tempt him not with feeling secure from Thy disapproval,

فَيُصِرَّ عَلَى ظُلْمِي وَيُحَاضِرَنِي بِحَقِّيْ

lest he persist in wronging me and constrain me in my rights.

وَعَرِّفْهُ عَمَّا قَلِيْل مَا أَوْعَدْتَ الظَّالِمِينَ،

Let him soon recognize what Thou hast promised the wrongdoers

وَعَرِّفْنِي مَا وَعَدْتَ مِنْ إجَابَةِ الْمُضْطَرِّينَ.

and let me recognize Thy promised response to the distressed!

أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ،

O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَوَفِّقْنِي لِقَبُولِ مَا قَضَيْتَ لِيْ وَعَليَّ،

give me success in accepting Thy decrees for me and against me,

وَرَضِّنِيْ بِمَا أَخَذْتَ لي وَمِنِّي

make me pleased with what Thou takest for me and from me,

وَاهْـدِنِي لِلَّتِيْ هِي أَقْوَمُ وَاسْتَعْمِلْنِي بِمَا هُوَ أَسْلَمُ.

guide me to that which is most upright and employ me in that which is safest!

أللَّهُمَّ وَإنْ كَانَتِ الْخِيَرَةُ لِيْ عِنْدَكَ

O God, if the best for me with Thee lies

فِي تَأْخِيرِ الأَخْذِ لِي وَتَرْكِ الانْتِقَامِ

in delaying the taking to task for my sake of him

مِمَّنْ ظَلَمَنِيْ إلَى يَوْمِ الْفَصْلِ وَمَجْمَعِ الْخَصْمِ،

who has wronged me and in refraining from vengeance toward him until the Day of Decision and the Gathering of Disputants,

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ ،

then bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَأَيِّدْنِي مِنْكَ بِنِيَّة صَادِقَة وَصَبْر دَائِم،

strengthen me from Thee with true intention and lasting patience,

وَأَعِذْنِي مِنْ سُوءِ الرَّغْبَةِ، وَهَلَعِ أَهْلِ الْحِرْصِ،

give me refuge from evil desire and the impatience of the greedy

وَصَوِّرْ فِي قَلْبِي مِثَالَ مَا ادَّخَـرْتَ لِي مِنْ ثَوَابِـكَ،

and form in my heart the image of Thy reward

وَأَعْدَدْتَ لِخَصْمِي مِنْ جَزَائِكَ وَعِقَابِكَ ،

which Thou hast stored away for me and the repayment and punishment

وَاجْعَلْ ذَلِكَ سَبَباً لِقَنَاعَتِي بِمَا قَضَيْتَ ،

which Thou has prepared for my disputant! Make this a cause of my contentment with what Thou hast decreed

وَثِقَتِي بِمَا تَخَيَّرْتَ، آمِينَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ ،

and my trust in what Thou hast chosen! Amen, Lord of the worlds!

إنَّكَ ذُو الْفَضْلِ الْعَظِيمِ ، وَأَنْتَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْء قَدِيرٌ .

Thou art of bounty abounding and Thou art powerful over everything.

أللَّهُمَّ وَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ

أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ ،
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
وَأَعِدْنِي عَلَيْهِ عَدْوى حَاضِرَةً تَكُونُ مِنْ غَيْظِي بِهِ شِفَاءً،

and redeem my fury toward him!
أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
وَعَوِّضْنِي مِنْ ظُلْمِهِ لِي عَفْوَكَ،

and form in my heart the image of Thy reward
وَأَعْدَدْتَ لِخَصْمِي مِنْ جَزَائِكَ وَعِقَابِكَ ،

وَاجْعَلْ ذَلِكَ سَبَباً لِقَنَاعَتِي بِمَا قَضَيْتَ ،

Thou art of bounty abounding and Thou art powerful over everything.

pairs.arabic: يَامَنْ لاَ يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ أَنْبَآءُ الْمُتَظَلِّمِينَ

translations.text: O He from whom is not concealed news of the aggrieved!

pairs.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يَحْتَاجُ فِي قِصَصِهِمْ إلَى شَهَادَاتِ الشَّاهِدِينَ

translations.text: O He who has no need to be told about them by the witnessing of the witnesses!

pairs.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ قَرُبَتْ نُصْرَتُهُ مِنَ الْمَظْلُومِينَ

translations.text: O He who whose help is near to the wronged!

pairs.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ بَعُدَ عَوْنُهُ عَنِ الظَّالِمِينَ قَدْ عَلِمْتَ

translations.text: O He whose aid is far from the wrongdoers! Thou knowest,

pairs.arabic: يَا إلهِي مَا نالَنِي مِنْ [فُلاَنِ بْنِ فُلاَن] مِمَّا حَظَرْتَ

translations.text: my God, how so-and-so, son of so-and-so, has harmed me in that which Thou hast forbidden,

pairs.arabic: وَانْتَهَكَهُ مِنّي مِمَّا حَجَزْتَ عَلَيْهِ بَطَراً فِي نِعْمَتِكَ عِنْدَهُ وَاغْتِرَاراً بِنَكِيرِكَ عَلَيْهِ

translations.text: and how he has violated me in that which Thou hast prohibited, showing thereby ingratitude toward Thy favour upon him and delusion concerning what Thou hast denied him.

pairs.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ اللَّهُمَّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ

translations.text: O God, so bless Muhammad and his Household,

pairs.arabic: وَخُذْ ظَالِمِي وَعَدُوِّي عَنْ ظُلْمِي بِقُوَّتِكَ

translations.text: keep my wrongdoing enemy from wronging me through Thy strength,

pairs.arabic: وَافْلُلْ حَدَّهُ عَنِّي بِقُدْرَتِكَ وَاجْعَلْ لَهُ

translations.text: blunt his blade toward me through Thy power, and assign to him

pairs.arabic: شُغْلاً فِيَما يَلِيهِ وَعَجْزاً عَمَّا يُناوِيْهِ

translations.text: a diversion in that which is close to him and the inability to reach his enemy!

pairs.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ وَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ

translations.text: O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

pairs.arabic: وَلاَ تُسَوِّغْ لَهُ ظُلْمِي وَأَحْسِنْ عَلَيْـهِ عَوْنِي،

translations.text: let the wrongdoer not find it easy to wrong me, give me good help against him,

pairs.arabic: وَاعْصِمْنِي مِنْ مِثْـلِ أَفْعَالِهِ، وَلا تَجْعَلْنِي فِي مِثْلِ حَالِهِ.

translations.text: preserve me from the like of his acts, and place me not in the like of his situation!

pairs.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ ،

translations.text: O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

pairs.arabic: وَأَعِدْنِي عَلَيْهِ عَدْوى حَاضِرَةً تَكُونُ مِنْ غَيْظِي بِهِ شِفَاءً،

translations.text: and assist me with an immediate assistance that will heal my rage toward him

pairs.arabic: وَمِنْ حَنَقِي عَلَيْهِ وَفَاءً.

translations.text: and redeem my fury toward him!

pairs.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ

translations.text: O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

pairs.arabic: وَعَوِّضْنِي مِنْ ظُلْمِهِ لِي عَفْوَكَ،

translations.text: compensate me for his wronging me with Thy pardon

pairs.arabic: وَأَبْدِلْنِي بِسُوْءِ صنِيعِهِ بِيْ رَحْمَتَكَ،

translations.text: and replace his evil action toward me with Thy mercy,

pairs.arabic: فَكُلُّ مَكْرُوه جَلَلٌ دُونَ سَخَطِكَ،

translations.text: for every detested thing less than Thy anger is slight

pairs.arabic: وَكُلُّ مُرْزِئَةٍ سَوَاءٌ مَعَ مَوْجِدَتِكَ.

translations.text: and every disaster next to Thy rancour indifferent!

pairs.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا كَـرَّهْتَ إلَيَّ أَنْ أَظْلِمَ فَقِنِي مِنْ أَنْ أُظْلَمَ.

translations.text: O God, just as Thou hast made me detest being wronged, so also protect me from doing wrong!

pairs.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ لاَ أَشْكُو إلَى أَحَد سِوَاكَ،

translations.text: O God, I complain to no one but Thee,

pairs.arabic: وَلاَ أَسْتَعِينُ بِحَاكِم غَيْرِكَ حَاشَاكَ

translations.text: and I seek help from no ruler other than Thee - how could I?

pairs.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ،

translations.text: So bless Muhammad and his Household,

pairs.arabic: وَصِلْ دُعَائِي بِالإِجَابَةِ، وَأَقْرِنْ شِكَايَتِي بِالتَّغْيِيرِ.

translations.text: join my supplication to response, and unite my complaint with change!

pairs.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ لا تَفْتِنِّي بِالْقُنُوطِ مِنْ إنْصَافِكَ،

translations.text: O God, tempt me not with despair of Thy just treatment

pairs.arabic: وَلاَ تَفْتِنْـهُ بِالأَمْنِ مِنْ إنْكَارِكَ،

translations.text: and tempt him not with feeling secure from Thy disapproval,

pairs.arabic: فَيُصِرَّ عَلَى ظُلْمِي وَيُحَاضِرَنِي بِحَقِّيْ

translations.text: lest he persist in wronging me and constrain me in my rights.

pairs.arabic: وَعَرِّفْهُ عَمَّا قَلِيْل مَا أَوْعَدْتَ الظَّالِمِينَ،

translations.text: Let him soon recognize what Thou hast promised the wrongdoers

pairs.arabic: وَعَرِّفْنِي مَا وَعَدْتَ مِنْ إجَابَةِ الْمُضْطَرِّينَ.

translations.text: and let me recognize Thy promised response to the distressed!

pairs.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ،

translations.text: O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

pairs.arabic: وَوَفِّقْنِي لِقَبُولِ مَا قَضَيْتَ لِيْ وَعَليَّ،

translations.text: give me success in accepting Thy decrees for me and against me,

pairs.arabic: وَرَضِّنِيْ بِمَا أَخَذْتَ لي وَمِنِّي

translations.text: make me pleased with what Thou takest for me and from me,

pairs.arabic: وَاهْـدِنِي لِلَّتِيْ هِي أَقْوَمُ وَاسْتَعْمِلْنِي بِمَا هُوَ أَسْلَمُ.

translations.text: guide me to that which is most upright and employ me in that which is safest!

pairs.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ وَإنْ كَانَتِ الْخِيَرَةُ لِيْ عِنْدَكَ

translations.text: O God, if the best for me with Thee lies

pairs.arabic: فِي تَأْخِيرِ الأَخْذِ لِي وَتَرْكِ الانْتِقَامِ

translations.text: in delaying the taking to task for my sake of him

pairs.arabic: مِمَّنْ ظَلَمَنِيْ إلَى يَوْمِ الْفَصْلِ وَمَجْمَعِ الْخَصْمِ،

translations.text: who has wronged me and in refraining from vengeance toward him until the Day of Decision and the Gathering of Disputants,

pairs.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ ،

translations.text: then bless Muhammad and his Household,

pairs.arabic: وَأَيِّدْنِي مِنْكَ بِنِيَّة صَادِقَة وَصَبْر دَائِم،

translations.text: strengthen me from Thee with true intention and lasting patience,

pairs.arabic: وَأَعِذْنِي مِنْ سُوءِ الرَّغْبَةِ، وَهَلَعِ أَهْلِ الْحِرْصِ،

translations.text: give me refuge from evil desire and the impatience of the greedy

pairs.arabic: وَصَوِّرْ فِي قَلْبِي مِثَالَ مَا ادَّخَـرْتَ لِي مِنْ ثَوَابِـكَ،

translations.text: and form in my heart the image of Thy reward

pairs.arabic: وَأَعْدَدْتَ لِخَصْمِي مِنْ جَزَائِكَ وَعِقَابِكَ ،

translations.text: which Thou hast stored away for me and the repayment and punishment

pairs.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ ذَلِكَ سَبَباً لِقَنَاعَتِي بِمَا قَضَيْتَ ،

translations.text: which Thou has prepared for my disputant! Make this a cause of my contentment with what Thou hast decreed

pairs.arabic: وَثِقَتِي بِمَا تَخَيَّرْتَ، آمِينَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ ،

translations.text: and my trust in what Thou hast chosen! Amen, Lord of the worlds!

pairs.arabic: إنَّكَ ذُو الْفَضْلِ الْعَظِيمِ ، وَأَنْتَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْء قَدِيرٌ .

translations.text: Thou art of bounty abounding and Thou art powerful over everything.
